# anthropic_skills (Data Source)

List all available Skills (both Anthropic-provided and custom).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all available skills (both Anthropic-provided and custom)
data "anthropic_skills" "all" {}

output "skills" {
  value = data.anthropic_skills.all.skills
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `skills` (Attributes List) List of skills. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--skills))

<a id="nestedatt--skills"></a>
### Nested Schema for `skills`

Read-Only:

- `display_title` (String) Display title of the Skill.
- `id` (String) ID of the Skill.
- `latest_version` (String) Latest version of the Skill.
- `source` (String) Source of the Skill (`anthropic` or `custom`).
